prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-DINOPLAYSET-6PC Product Type: TOY_FIGURE_PLAYSET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Buildable STEM Dinosaur Toy Figure Assemble & Create Action Creatures (T-Rex, Acanthosaurus, Macrosaurus, and Triceratops) Description: Perfect for any Jurassic Journey into make-believe this Assemble Dinosaur World STEM Dinosaur Kit features 4 different prehistoric creatures - the Tyrannosaurus Rex, Acanthosaurus, Macrosaurus, and Triceratops. All dinos can be assembled and disassembled easily with the provided screws and child-size grip screwdrivers. Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with this DIY take apart dinosaur kit, but he or she will also be developing and improving their hand-eye coordination, dexterity, and fine motor skills while encouraging creativity and imagination through playtime.

Other take-apart toys are complicated and frustrating, but your child will be sure to thrive with the easy and intuitive assembly of the Kidplokio Dino STEM toyset with parts that fit seamlessly together. Once fully assembled these dinosaurs can be repositioned by moving their heads, neck, legs, and tails, which allows kids to simulate dinosaur movements, enrich their imagination and take part in storytelling with their prehistoric pals.

Made of high-quality, non-toxic ABS plastic these durable dinosaurs are built to withstand hours of assembly and playtime. Kids will enjoy unlimited hours of creative fun without worrying about these STEM-learning dinosaurs breaking. They are also an excellent addition to any preschool or kindergarten classroom. Make sure to grab one of these sets for your child who is obsessed with dinosaurs. They are also great gifts for birthdays, holidays, and dino-themed parties. Search Terms: STEM kids buildable dinosaur toy toddler toy action figure toys super hero action figure godzilla action figure toy Features: - STEM DINOSAUR PRETEND PLAY SET: This DIY take apart Dinosaur Toy Set offers hours of entertainment while your budding paleontologist assembles and disassembles 4 different prehistoric creatures, the Tyrannosaurus Rex, Acanthosaurus, Macrosaurus, and Triceratops. Each unique dinosaur can easily be disassembled using either of the 2 provided screwdrivers to unscrew multiple parts of the dinosaur - EDUCATIONAL TOYS: The Assemble Dinosaur World Toy is a great beginner engineering dinosaur pretend play set for kids. A perfect blend of engaging fun and education, it can help children improve their problem solving skills, hand eye coordination, and fine motor skills - EASY ASSEMBLY WITH MOVEABLE PARTS: With large screws and kid's size screwdriver, taking apart and rebuilding these prehistoric creatures is a breeze. Once fully assembled, these dinosaurs can be repositioned by moving their heads, neck, legs, and tails. This allows kids to simulate dinosaur movements, enrich their imagination and take part in storytelling with their prehistoric pals - DURABLE, SAFE CONSTRUCTION: Made of high-quality, non-toxic ABS plastic, these durable dinosaurs are built to withstand hours of assembly and play time. Kids will enjoy unlimited hours of creative fun without worry of these STEM-learning dinosaurs breaking. These dino toys are also an excellent addition to any preschool or kindergarten classroom - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Non-toxic ABS plastic; Colors: Assorted; Pieces: 4 Dinosaurs and 2 screwdrivers; Safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
